chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2264 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For orders as to maintainability of petition 28.02.2025 Mr. Naseer Nehal Hashmi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh On the last date the following order was passed: “Learned counsel for the petitioner is directed to come prepared to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of the petition on the next date, inasmuch as the matter appears to relate to a dispute between the petitioner and the private respondents. Adjourned” Today, learned counsel remained unable to dispel the objection as to the maintainability. In view of the aforesaid objection, petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
